name: intl-pipeline
description: Use when working on the translation pipeline (`src/scripts/intl-pipeline/`), the post-import sanitizer (`intl-sanitizer.ts`), the `intl/pending-*` branches, the `intl-pipeline.yml` GitHub Actions workflow, ETHGlossary integration, or any translation-related issue (broken translations, missing locales, manifest drift, sanitizer false positives, ETHGlossary term lookups, language-group transliteration questions). Provides the manifest-driven incremental pipeline mental model, the "don't hand-propa
author: ethereum
summary_zh: 一套基于清单的增量翻译流水线工具，配套清理器与 GitHub Actions，适合处理翻译损坏、语言缺失、术语对照、ETHGlossary 集成等多语言维护场景。
